title: calamintha heterophylla
intro: Calamintha heterophylla, also known as Whorled Calamint or Whorled Mint, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce pain. The health benefits of Calamintha heterophylla include its ability to aid digestion, relieve stress and anxiety, and promote respiratory health. Calamintha heterophylla can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in essential oil form to provide its medicinal benefits.
